scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @sse/api" "npm run dev -w @sse/web"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @sse/api && npm run build -w @sse/web
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w @sse/api && npm run lint -w @sse/web
scripts.test: npm run test -w @sse/api && npm run test -w @sse/web
scripts.test:unit: npm run test:unit -w @sse/api && npm run test:unit -w @sse/web
